title: Broad repo Python reduction sweep K
summary: Added operator/control-plane Python sweep regression coverage and an exact-lane report so the retired collaboration, issue archive, console IA, design-system, dashboard, and UI review Python ownership slice stays Go/native only.

validation.command: find src/bigclaw bigclaw-go/internal/api bigclaw-go/internal/product bigclaw-go/internal/consoleia bigclaw-go/internal/designsystem bigclaw-go/internal/uireview bigclaw-go/internal/collaboration bigclaw-go/internal/issuearchive -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort
